CustomField.description: This field is automatically populated from the Rent Slip->Start Date for Rent invoices, from the Utilization->Start Date for Aircraft MR invoices, from Interest Start Date for Interest invoices, from Reconciliation Start Date for Non-MR invoices, from Sublease Invoice->Period Start Date for HL/SL invoices (both Rent and MR), from 'Invoice Deferred From' ->Period Start Date. For all other types, it is manually entered on the invoice.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Autofilled from Rent start for Rent/Utilization start for MR/Interest start for Interest/Reconciliation start for Non MR/Sublease invoice start for HL/SL and related Rent or MR start for Deferred Rent/MR invoices. Manually entered for other invoice types.
CustomField.label: Period Start Date
